nodes.name: Pale-legged warbler
nodes.summary: Pale-legged warbler（Myiothlypis signata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Pale-legged warbler。

nodes.name: Pale-legged warbler
nodes.summary: The pale-legged warbler (Myiothlypis signata) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is native to Argentina, Bolivia, Colombia and Peru. Its habitats include subtropical or tropical moist montane, as well as subtropical or tropical heavily degraded former forest. References

nodes.name: Myiothlypis
nodes.summary: Myiothlypis（Myiothlypis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Grey-headed warbler、Santa Marta warbler、Citrine warbler等15种鸟类。
